class.name: OpenXRSpatialEntityTracker
class.brief_description: Base class for Positional trackers managed by OpenXR's spatial entity extensions.
class.description: These are trackers created and managed by OpenXR's spatial entity extensions that give access to specific data related to OpenXR's spatial entities. They will always be of type [code]TRACKER_ANCHOR[/code].

method.name: add_next
method.description: Adds a new [OpenXRStructureBase] to the next-chain. [method get_next] will return this [param next] until either [method add_next] is called again or it's removed in [method remove_next].

method.name: get_next
method.description: Gets the head [OpenXRStructureBase] in the next-chain. See also [method add_next] and [method remove_next].

method.name: get_spatial_context
method.description: Gets the spatial context used to create this [OpenXRSpatialEntityTracker].

method.name: remove_next
method.description: Removes a [param next] object previously added in [method add_next] from the next-chain.

method.name: set_spatial_context
method.description: Sets the spatial context used to create this tracker.

members.member: The spatial entity associated with this tracker.
The spatial tracking state for this tracker.

signal.name: next_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the next-chain changes, from either [method add_next] or [method remove_next].

constants.constant: This anchor is currently being tracked.
